---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the dataset, tooling, or documentation
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the gap or friction clearly.

## Proposed change

Describe the improvement you want to see.

## Why it matters

Explain the expected impact for users of the dataset or repo.

## Extra context

Add links, examples, or prior art if relevant.
